title: LPG-Producing Refineries in India
description: All major oil refineries in India that produce LPG as a by-product. Data as of 2025.
source: Petroleum Planning & Analysis Cell (PPAC), Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Government of India

refineries.name: Jamnagar Refinery (Reliance Industries)
refineries.notes: World's largest refinery complex. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF, naphtha, petrochemicals.

refineries.name: Vadinar Refinery (Nayara Energy)
refineries.notes: Formerly Essar Oil refinery. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, petrochemicals.

refineries.name: Koyali Refinery (Gujarat Refinery, IOCL)
refineries.notes: One of IOCL's largest refineries. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF and other products.

refineries.name: Panipat Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: Integrated refinery-petrochemical complex. Produces LPG, naphtha, PX, MEG, PTA.

refineries.name: Mathura Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: Refinery serving northern India. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, kerosene.

refineries.name: Barauni Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: One of first public sector refineries in India (est. 1964). Produces LPG and other petroleum products.

refineries.name: Haldia Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: Serves eastern India. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF and other petroleum products.

refineries.name: Digboi Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: Asia's oldest refinery, commissioned 1901. Produces LPG, wax, lubricants.

refineries.name: Guwahati Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: Northeast India's main refinery. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, kerosene.

refineries.name: Bongaigaon Refinery (IOCL / BRPL)
refineries.notes: Formerly Bongaigaon Refinery & Petrochemicals Ltd (BRPL). Produces LPG and petroleum products.

refineries.name: Paradip Refinery (IOCL)
refineries.notes: Modern refinery. Produces LPG, BS-VI fuels, petrochemicals.

refineries.name: Numaligarh Refinery (NRL)
refineries.notes: Known as Assam Accord Refinery. Products include LPG, naphtha, MS, ATF, HSD, petroleum coke.

refineries.name: Mumbai Refinery (HPCL)
refineries.notes: Commissioned 1954. Produces LPG, naphtha, MS, ATF, HSD, lubricants, bitumen.

refineries.name: Visakh Refinery (HPCL)
refineries.notes: First East Coast refinery of India (1957). Produces LPG, propylene, naphtha, MS, ATF, HSD, bitumen.

refineries.name: Guru Gobind Singh Refinery (HMEL)
refineries.notes: JV between HPCL and Mittal Energy Investments. Produces LPG, BS-VI fuels, petrochemicals.

refineries.name: Mumbai Refinery (BPCL)
refineries.notes: BPCL flagship refinery, West Coast. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF, petrochemical feedstock.

refineries.name: Kochi Refinery (BPCL)
refineries.notes: Integrated refinery-petrochemical complex in southern India. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF.

refineries.name: Bina Refinery (BORL / BPCL)
refineries.notes: JV between BPCL and Oman Oil Company. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF, naphtha.

refineries.name: Mangalore Refinery (MRPL)
refineries.notes: ONGC subsidiary. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF, naphtha, polypropylene.

refineries.name: Manali Refinery (CPCL)
refineries.notes: IOCL subsidiary. Produces LPG, MS, HSD, ATF, lube base stocks, bitumen, hexane.

refineries.name: Cauvery Basin Refinery (CPCL)
refineries.notes: CPCL second refinery. Produces LPG, naphtha, kerosene, HSD.

refineries.name: Tatipaka Mini Refinery (ONGC)
refineries.notes: Mini refinery processing local Godavari basin crude. Produces LPG, naphtha, HSD.

refineries.name: Barmer Refinery (HRRL) [Under commissioning]
refineries.notes: JV between HPCL (74%) and Govt of Rajasthan (26%). Greenfield refinery-cum-petrochemical complex.
